results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Single-head cross-attention routing for query-model joint embedding IS the multi-criteria K-route gate paradigm.
Dynamic routing + cascading survey covers multi-criteria + sequential gate routing paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — Safety classification + intent routing in vLLM semantic router IS the multi-criteria gate (intent + safety) routing mechanism.
Hierarchical routers with top-k dynamic token retrieval IS the per-route sub-style top-K-head matching paradigm.
Head-specific sigmoid gate after SDPA IS the per-route gate mechanism at attention-head granularity.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Union of Experts Hierarchical Routing Subspace
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — UoE hierarchical routing of input subspaces to experts via sparse gating IS the K-route + sub-style routing mechanism.

results.matched_effect_cluster: MoA Mixture of Attention Heads Per-Token
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — MoA Router selects k attention heads per-token + weighted sum IS the per-route top-K-head matching + compound mixture-of-route output.
Cost-aware routing with prompt-classification + multi-model switching IS the multi-criteria gate routing paradigm.
